scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix react/htwg-dashboard-react"
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix react/htwg-dashboard-react && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run db:migrate --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix react/htwg-dashboard-react
